name: PhantomBuster
description: Cloud automations (Phantoms) for LinkedIn, Sales Navigator, Twitter, Instagram, Google Maps, etc. Run a Phantom (e.g. 'Sales Navigator Search Export') with arguments and pull the result CSV. Use for LinkedIn-side prospection that bare APIs can't do.

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API key
credential_fields.description: PhantomBuster API key from phantombuster.com → Account Settings → API key

tools.name: list_agents
tools.description: List all your Phantoms (agents). Returns id + name + script id.

tools.name: get_agent
tools.description: Get a single Phantom's config (current arguments, last run, schedule).

tools.name: launch_agent
tools.description: Launch a Phantom with optional override arguments. Returns a containerId — poll get_container_output.

argument.description: Arguments to pass to the Phantom (overrides saved config)

tools.name: get_container_output
tools.description: Fetch the output of a running/finished Phantom container. Use after launch_agent.

tools.name: fetch_result_object
tools.description: Fetch a Phantom's structured result object (typically JSON / CSV-as-JSON of scraped data).
